code_value:
M: What are you doing, Lisa?

W: I am reading a book about different festivals around the world. It is quite interesting.

M: Really? What do you think is the most interesting festival?

W: I think the Water Festival is the funniest.

M: Do you know Holi? It is a traditional festival in India.

W: I haven't heard of it before. When do people in India celebrate it?

M: It usually comes in February or March every year. People make a lot of traditional food that day.

W: Wow, that must be fun.

ets_th1 What is Lisa reading?
(A book about countries. / A book about festivals. / A book about foods.)
ets_th2 How do people in India celebrate Holi?
(Make traditional food. / Send family presents. / Colour their faces.)
